description: Fix friction in the plugin scaffolder (opentabs plugin create) discovered during Notion plugin development. The scaffold generates package.json with a stale zod version, missing jiti devDependency, and isReady() comments that don't cover cookie-only auth patterns.

userStories.title: Resolve zod devDependency version dynamically in scaffold
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the scaffolded package.json to use the same zod version as the plugin-sdk so that there are no type incompatibilities between my plugin and the SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: The scaffolded package.json devDependencies.zod matches the zod version from plugin-sdk's own dependencies or peerDependencies (currently ^4.3.6), not the hardcoded ^4.0.0
The peerDependencies.zod remains ^4.0.0 (broad range is correct for peer deps)
userStories.notes: File: platform/cli/src/scaffold.ts, function generatePackageJson() around line 77. The SDK version is already resolved dynamically via resolveOpenTabsVersion() which reads the installed @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk package.json. Add similar logic to resolve the zod version: read the plugin-sdk's package.json and extract its dependencies.zod or peerDependencies.zod version. The current code hardcodes `'zod': '^4.0.0'` in both peerDependencies and devDependencies (lines 114 and 123). The peerDependencies should stay broad (^4.0.0) but devDependencies should match the actual version from plugin-sdk. Note: resolveOpenTabsVersion() already reads the SDK package.json to get the version string — extend this to also return the zod version. The existing fallback pattern (return '*' on error) should apply to zod resolution too.

userStories.title: Add jiti to scaffolded devDependencies
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the scaffolded package.json to include jiti in devDependencies so that my plugin matches the established pattern used by all official plugins.
acceptanceCriteria: The scaffolded package.json includes jiti in devDependencies with version ^2.6.1
The jiti entry appears alphabetically sorted in the devDependencies object
userStories.notes: File: platform/cli/src/scaffold.ts, function generatePackageJson() around line 118. Add `jiti: '^2.6.1'` to the devDependencies object. All three official plugins (slack, discord, github) include this. The devDependencies object is currently: { '@biomejs/biome': '2.4.5', '@opentabs-dev/plugin-tools': openTabsVersion, typescript: '^5.9.3', zod: '...' }. Add jiti between @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools and typescript to maintain alphabetical order.

userStories.title: Add cookie-only auth pattern to scaffolded isReady() comments
userStories.description: As a plugin developer building plugins for apps with HttpOnly cookie auth (like Notion), I want the scaffold comments to show the cookie-only auth pattern so that I know how to implement isReady() when the auth token is not readable from JavaScript.
acceptanceCriteria: The isReady() comment block in the scaffolded src/index.ts includes a new section showing the cookie-only auth pattern
The new pattern shows detecting auth via a non-HttpOnly indicator cookie (e.g., user_id cookie) with a note that HttpOnly cookies are sent automatically via credentials: 'include'
The comment is concise (4-6 lines of example code) and consistent with the existing comment style
